---
title: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---
<style>
.card {
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  background-color: #f8f9fa !important;
  border: 1px solid #e9ecef !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
}
.section-spacing {
  margin-top: 50px;
}
</style>

<div style="max-width: 250px; margin: 40 px auto; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);">
  <img src="visuals/EsshaKhan_Headshot@1x.jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto; display: block;">
</div>

<br><br>

::: {.card .p-4 .mb-4}
## Hi, I'm Essha

I'm a Master’s candidate in **Applied Business Data Analytics** at **Boston University** with a strong interest in bridging data analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.

My academic background, combined with hands on experience in **Python, SQL, Power BI, and Plotly**, has equipped me to transform complex datasets into actionable insights.

I am particularly interested in understanding how data can drive decision making in real world business contexts. My recent work includes building predictive models, analyzing large scale job market datasets using **PySpark and AWS**, and exploring financial data to uncover trends and patterns.

Professionally, I am interested in pursuing roles in **data analytics** or **product analytics**, where I can combine my analytical skills with my background in design and user experience.
:::

::: {.card .p-4 .mb-4}
## Skills

- **Programming Languages:** Python, SQL, R  
- **Data Analysis:** pandas, data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, feature engineering  
- **Big Data Tools:** PySpark, Apache Spark  
- **Data Visualization:** Power BI, Plotly, matplotlib  
- **Cloud Technologies:** AWS EC2, data workflows  
- **Machine Learning:** regression modeling, predictive analytics  
- **Tools & Platforms:** Jupyter Notebook, Git, Excel  
- **Core Strengths:** analytical thinking, problem solving, attention to detail  
- **Additional Strengths:** data storytelling, business insight, user focused design mindset  
:::
